summary: Implement compile() builtin with real CodeObject type (#976). Added ObjKind::CodeObject (tag 13) and ObjData::CodeObject to rc.rs. Added MbObject::new_code_object() constructor. Replaced mb_compile stub with full implementation supporting exec/eval/single modes, SyntaxError with line/col, ValueError for bad modes, bytes source, and 5-arg form. Added CodeObject arms to all exhaustive ObjData matches. 9 unit tests cover all acceptance criteria.
